impacts.statement: Water will encroach on a single lane of Highway 21 along a few low sections adjacent to Mores Creek.
Water will be near the edge of Highway 21 in some low spots along Mores Creek, between Robie Creek and Idaho City.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice.
